chat_logs.text: Hello. How are you?
I am good. I am pretty excited for the trip this weekend. what about you?
Very excited. It will be fun.

Yes, Hopefully the weather holds up. So I was thinking, i am bringning my two kids along with me, and they will need food, so I was thinking i could take the three foods, and either one of the firewood or water, up to you.
I would also like a little extra food for my kids. Maybe we can split it somehow?
Ok, I am willing to give you one food, in exchange for two firewoods, that would mean you get 3 waters, 1 food and 1 firewood. you get 5 items, while i get 4.
If I only get 1 food, than I would like 2 firewood. So you get 2 food, 1 firewood, and 1 water.

No i do not need water, as i am camping near a potable stream. I would like 2 firewood. It is only fair that i get two firewood, since you are getting more supplies (5), i think i should be able to choose what 4 i should get.
No, if you get 2 food, it's only fair that I get 2 firewood.
Then i will take 3 waters, and 2 food.
Okay I will take all the firewood and 1 food.
Submit-Deal
Accept-Deal

value2reason.High: when I get nervous or scared I eat, so I'd like more food
value2reason.Medium: I don't like the dark, so this would help keep it light.
value2reason.Low: I can do without water, but will take it.

value2reason.High: I am camping with two children, and need food to keep them comfortable
value2reason.Medium: It eliminates the heavy misquito coverage at night
value2reason.Low: The stream nearby is very clean

chat_logs.text: What are you most interested in getting?
I think food is my highest priority, What about you?
Food is also my highest priority, but firewood is also pretty close for me.
Would you be willing to take more firewood for less food?
Yes I think that sounds fair.
So if I take 2 foods and 1 firewood, you take 1 food and 2 firewood. What would be fair for water?
What if I take two waters and you take one water then?
I think that sounds fair, since you compromised on food. Sounds like a deal!
I'm glad we could come to a compromise 🙂
Me too 🙂 Thanks for making it easy and pleasant.
Submit-Deal
Accept-Deal

value2reason.High: I didn't have a chance to eat before, so would like to have some food packages so I am not hungry during the trip.
value2reason.Medium: It is supposed to be a very cold evening and firewood would be helpful to stay warm.
value2reason.Low: I enjoy hiking a great deal and water is an essential item to hike at my best.

value2reason.High: I am not an outdoorsy person. I would have a hard time identifying and finding food on my own.
value2reason.Medium: I don't know how to start a fire without firewood.
value2reason.Low: Clean water is an important resource and something you cannot go without for long.

chat_logs.text: Hello, what are your preferences for food, water, and firewood?
Hey, nice getting to interact with you. I would like to have additional packages of firewood and water
Okay, I would like to have additional packages of food and water.
I would take 2 packages of firewood and 1 each of water and food. Let me know your thoughts.
I actually need 2 packages of firewood for making more fires when camping.
I can't take cold and would badly need to have more firewood.
I need more firewood to keep my food going.
I get it, in that case I'' take additional packages of food.
I don't think so, because I need additional packages of food in case there is an emergency.
I was under the impression you don't have the need for additional firewood as you mentioned you need additional of food and water. Let me know how many packages of item you need.
You're right, I meant to say that I need additional food and water.
So, let me know how much exactly do you want of each item
I would like 2 packages of food and 2 packages of water.
In that case, I can take 2 packages of firewood. So , it would be a fair deal. I can share with you in case you have the need.
Okay, that is a fair deal then. It is settled.
Thank you. Have a nice day ahead!
Thank you. Have a nice day ahead too!
Submit-Deal
Accept-Deal

value2reason.High: Because I need more for an emergency.
value2reason.Medium: Because I need more for hiking.
value2reason.Low: Because I need more for making fires.

value2reason.High: Owing to the weather conditions and situations, I might nee dit.
value2reason.Medium: It would be a great advantage if I have it as I always have a need for it.
value2reason.Low: I have food and can manage with my current quantity.
